summary: The CI job failed during the build/test phase on macOS. There are 62 errors logged including g++ and gcc compilation errors, addon build failures, and a stderr error captured by the test harness. The errors appear to be build-related compilation failures.
root_cause: Multiple g++ and gcc compilation errors occurred while building Node.js and its addons on macOS, causing the CI job to fail.

evidence.reason: Repeated g++ compilation command failures (12 occurrences) indicate compilation errors during the build phase.
gcc compilation failures (2 occurrences) further indicate build-time compilation errors.
Addon build failures (4 occurrences) show that native addon compilation is also failing.
GitHub Actions error annotation capturing stderr output indicates a command failed and produced error output.
Errors referencing internal assert module (4 occurrences) suggest issues with source files or their compilation.
The --error-on-warn flag means any compiler warnings are treated as errors, which combined with deprecation warnings in ncrypto.cc could cause build failures.
Deprecation warnings in ncrypto dependencies, combined with --error-on-warn configure flag, could be causing compilation to fail as errors.

suggested_fix: Investigate the full stderr output captured at '##[error]--- stderr ---' to identify the specific compilation error. The '--error-on-warn' configure flag combined with deprecation warnings in '../deps/ncrypto/ncrypto.cc' (DH_set0_key, DH_get0_key, DSA_get0_pqg, DH_free, DH_get0_pqg) is a likely cause — update the ncrypto dependency to remove deprecated OpenSSL API usage or suppress those specific warnings.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
